application_uri.description: Globally unique identifier for the application instance, as of OPC-UA.

opcua_servers.description: Mapping of machine identifier to corresponding OPC-UA server configuration.

pki_dir.description: Root directory of the OPC-UA PKI.

traceability_redb_file.description:
Path to the redb file to use for traceability cache. It will be created
if it does not exist.

CreatePartIdConfig.description: Configuration related to part ID creation for an OPC-UA server.

raw_batch_node_id.description: OPC-UA node identifier of the raw material batch variable.

raw_part_ref_node_id.description: OPC-UA node identifier of the raw part reference variable.

MessageSecurityMode.description: A copy of [`opcua::crypto::MessageSecurityMode`] to allow using serde remote functionality.

OpcUaServerConfig.description: The configuration for an OPC-UA server to communicate with.

password.description: Password to use if using username/password authentication.

user.description:
Username if authenticating to the OPC-UA server with username/password.
If not provided, anonymous authentication will be used.

SecurityPolicy.description: A copy of [`opcua::crypto::SecurityPolicy`] to allow using serde remote functionality.

TraceabilityConfig.description: Traceability related configuration for an OPC-UA server.

heartbeat_node_id.description: OPC-UA node identifier of the heartbeat variable.

part_identifier.description: Configuration for part identifier creation, if applicable.

publish_interval.description: Publish interval to request when subscribing to request variable.

request_node_id.description: OPC-UA node identifier of the request variable.

response_node_id.description: OPC-UA node identifier of the response variable.
